name: Mermaid Gown Editorial Portrait
description: High-end editorial fashion photograph of woman reclining in heavily embellished champagne mermaid gown with cinematic dual-tone lighting
input_prompt: stunning woman in embellished champagne mermaid gown reclining gracefully editorial fashion

subject.description: stunning woman with voluminous wavy raven black hair, glamorous matte makeup with smoky eyes

hair.details: texture: wavy; volume: voluminous; length: long

face.makeup: finish: glamorous matte, eyes: smoky eye style

clothing.details: neckline: off-the-shoulder; bodice: style: corset-style midriff, material: mesh, structural_element: vertical boning; sleeves: adornment: delicate beaded fringe; embellishments: intensity: heavily embellished, style: intricate, materials: silver sequins, pearls, crystals

environment.location: editorial studio set with rustic elements

camera_technical.focus: sharpness: sharp focus, focal_point: beadwork textures and embellishments

flattened_prompt: 8k ultra-high-resolution high-end editorial fashion photograph, stunning woman with voluminous wavy raven black hair, glamorous matte makeup smoky eyes, serene expression softly closed eyes, one hand touching hair, gracefully reclining on rustic wood and woven jute daybed, champagne off-the-shoulder mermaid gown corset-style mesh bodice vertical boning, delicate beaded fringe sleeves, heavily embellished with intricate silver sequins pearls crystals, dark vertical wooden slats background, cinematic dual-tone lighting moody teal and warm amber, sharp focus on beadwork textures, luxurious captive shot, 9:16
negative_prompt_flat: casual clothing, daytime outdoor, flat lighting, overexposed, cartoon, 3d render, anime, blurry, low quality

color_palette.accent: moody teal lighting, warm amber highlights

flux.prompt: 8k editorial fashion photo, woman voluminous raven hair smoky eyes serene expression, reclining on rustic daybed wood jute, champagne mermaid gown off-shoulder corset bodice mesh boning, heavily embellished silver sequins pearls crystals beaded fringe, dark wooden slat background, cinematic dual-tone lighting teal and amber, sharp focus on beadwork, luxurious captive shot, 9:16
flux.negative_prompt: casual, flat lighting, overexposed, cartoon, 3d render, blurry, low quality

subject.description: Stunning woman with voluminous wavy raven black hair

gown.bodice: Corset-style midriff with mesh and vertical boning
gown.embellishments: Heavily embellished with intricate silver sequins, pearls, and crystals

scene.prop: Rustic daybed (charpai) made of wood and woven jute

camera.focus: Sharp focus on beadwork textures and embellishments
camera.negative_constraints: no flat lighting, no casual, no cartoon, no blurry

midjourney.prompt: high-end editorial fashion, woman raven hair smoky eyes reclining on rustic daybed, champagne mermaid gown sequins pearls crystals beaded fringe, dark wood background, cinematic teal and amber dual-tone lighting --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for editorial fashion authenticity

ideogram.prompt: Editorial fashion photograph of stunning woman with voluminous raven hair reclining gracefully on rustic daybed, wearing heavily embellished champagne off-the-shoulder mermaid gown with silver sequins pearls and crystals, dark wooden slat background, dramatic cinematic teal and amber lighting

recraft.prompt: Editorial fashion, woman reclining in champagne mermaid gown with beaded embellishments, rustic daybed, dark wood background, cinematic dual-tone teal amber lighting

luma.prompt: Cinematic fashion scene, elegant woman reclines on rustic daybed, her champagne gown catches light revealing intricate beadwork, teal and amber lighting shifts subtly, serene atmosphere of luxury
luma.motion_notes: Subtle light play on sequins and crystals, gentle breathing movement, hair settling

reve.prompt: High-end editorial fashion photography in the style of luxury magazine spreads, raven-haired woman in embellished champagne mermaid gown, rustic daybed prop, cinematic dual-tone teal and amber lighting, dramatic glamour

grok-imagine.prompt: Editorial fashion photo of woman with raven hair reclining on rustic daybed, champagne mermaid gown heavily embellished with sequins pearls crystals, dark wood background, cinematic teal and amber lighting, serene expression

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A stunning woman with voluminous wavy raven black hair is gracefully reclining on a rustic daybed made of wood and woven jute. Her eyes are softly closed with a serene expression, one hand gently touching her hair. She wears an exquisite champagne off-the-shoulder mermaid gown with a corset-style mesh bodice featuring vertical boning. The gown is heavily embellished with intricate silver sequins, pearls, and crystals, with delicate beaded fringe adorning the sleeves. Her makeup is glamorous with a matte finish and smoky eye style. The background features dark vertical wooden slats. Dramatic cinematic dual-tone lighting bathes the scene in moody teal and warm amber tones, creating sculptural shadows that highlight the intricate beadwork. High-end editorial fashion photography, 8K resolution. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture on fabric and skin.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Stunning woman with voluminous raven black hair reclining gracefully on rustic wood and jute daybed. Champagne off-shoulder mermaid gown with corset bodice, heavily embellished with silver sequins, pearls and crystals, beaded fringe sleeves. Serene expression with closed eyes, glamorous smoky makeup. Dark wooden slat background with cinematic dual-tone lighting in teal and amber. High-end editorial fashion photography, sharp focus on beadwork textures. Not 3D render, not cartoon.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A woman with voluminous wavy raven black hair reclines gracefully on a rustic daybed crafted from wood and woven jute. She wears a champagne off-the-shoulder mermaid gown with a corset-style mesh bodice and vertical boning. The gown features heavy embellishments of silver sequins, pearls, and crystals with delicate beaded fringe on the sleeves. Her expression is serene with softly closed eyes and glamorous matte smoky makeup. Dark vertical wooden slats form the background. Cinematic dual-tone lighting creates dramatic teal and warm amber tones. Editorial fashion photography with sharp focus on intricate beadwork details.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the lighting color scheme to cool blue and soft pink while keeping the gown, pose, and background the same. Preserve the intricate beadwork details and serene expression.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed gown construction (corset, boning, mesh, fringe), specific embellishment materials
2_realism_anchors: 'intricate beadwork texture', 'realistic fabric draping', 'wood grain', 'skin texture'
5_spatial_consistency: clear reclining pose with hand position specified
6_lighting_storytelling: 'cinematic dual-tone teal and amber' = luxurious dramatic mood
7_material_specificity: exact embellishment materials (silver sequins, pearls, crystals)
